summary: Across the interviews, customers describe lengthy manual reporting cycles and fragmented data systems that block timely decision-making.

painPoints.description: Manual monthly reporting consumes multiple days of finance team time

quotes.text: We spend three days every month closing the books

painPoints.description: Customer data is fragmented across many tools

quotes.text: I have to check four different dashboards

patterns.name: Manual close cycle
patterns.description: Repeated mention of multi-day end-of-month closing as a top pain.

keyQuotes.quote: We spend three days every month closing the books

recommendations: Prototype an automated monthly close workflow and run it past two interview participants for validation.
